name: White Wine-Marinated Squid
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Squid, body cut into rounds, tentacles left whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except squid in a 1-quart pot and bring to a boil over high heat on the stove.
2. Add the squid and cook for 30 seconds.
3. Remove from the heat immediately.
4. Pour the contents of the pot into a glass bowl, cover with a plate, and let cool to room temperature.
5. Place in refrigerator until chilled.
6. Serve over lettuce or chilled pasta.
